items.title: Deezer says AI-made songs make up 44 percent of daily uploads
items.summary: AI-generated music is spreading like wildfire, according to Deezer, who reported receiving nearly 75,000 uploads of AI-made tracks a day on its platform. The alternative music s...
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: FAA orders investigation into Blue Origin’s New Glenn mishap
items.summary: The New Glenn rocket will have to stay grounded while the company investigates what caused the apparent failure of its upper stage.
